description: Agent-facing skills for localization workflows in xliff-mcp-server.

skills.name: prepare_xliff_for_translation
skills.title: Prepare XLIFF For Translation
skills.summary: Validate XLIFF and extract a translation-ready segment list.

skills.name: translate_xliff_with_tags
skills.title: Translate XLIFF While Preserving Tags
skills.summary: Translate XLIFF safely without breaking inline markup.

skills.name: replace_xliff_targets_from_translations
skills.title: Rebuild XLIFF Targets From Translation Results
skills.summary: Merge approved translations back into the original XLIFF.

skills.name: inspect_tmx_translation_memory
skills.title: Inspect TMX Translation Memory
skills.summary: Validate TMX and summarize language pairs and entries.

skills.name: export_translation_data
skills.title: Export Translation Data As CSV Or JSON
skills.summary: Generate CSV or JSON file content from XLIFF or TMX inputs.
